ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 503, DEFENDANT PAC OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT. HEARING HELD. THE COURT CONTINUED DEFENDANT PAC OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT TO JUNE 24, 2015 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 503 AND SET A BRIEFING SCHEDULE. PLAINTIFF'S SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION IS DUE BY 4:00 PM ON JUNE 16, 2015 AND DEFENDANT'S SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY IS DUE BY 4:00 PM ON JUNE 18, 2015 BOTH FILINGS ARE NOT TO EXCEED 5 PAGES. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO THE STRICT LIABILITY. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, COURT REPORTER: ANGELA POURTABIB OF BARKLEY COURT REPORTERS, CSR #13714

ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION, 503, PLAINTIFF ANTHONY MARQUEZ' MOTION FOR RELIEF. HEARING HELD. THE COURT ENTERED THE FOLLOWING RULING: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY MARQUEZ' MOTION FOR RELIEF IS DENIED. THE COURT NOTED THAT IT STILL HAS THE DISCRETION TO CONSIDER PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITIONS EVEN THOUGH THEY WERE UNTIMELY FILED. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, COURT REPORTER: ANGELA POURTABIB OF BARKLEY COURT REPORTERS, CSR #13714

calendar.matters:
DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2016 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Stacey F. Blank of WOOD SMITH HENNING & BERMAN LLP 310.481.7605, appearing for defendant/moving party PAC Operating Limited Partnership.

Mahzad K. Hite of LEVIN SIMES 415.426.3136, appearing for plaintiff /opposing party Anthony Marquez.

RULING:
DEFENDANT PAC OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT AND THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION OF THE COMPLAINT.

Argument held. At the conclusion of argument, the Court stated that Defendant Pac Operating Limited Partnership's Demurrer To Complaint would be taken under submission on June 26, 2015. Each side submitted a proposed order for the Court's consideration. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Court Reporter: Jaimie M. Hopp of BARKLEY COURT REPORTERS, CSR #13751 (Tel: 925-759-0770). (503/TLJ)

Pac Operating Limited Partnerships Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Stacey F. Blank of WOOD SMITH HENNING & BERMAN LLP 310.481.7605, appearing for defendant / moving party PAC Operating Limited Partnership.

Mahzad K. Hite of LEVIN SIMES 415.426.3136, appearing for plaintiff /opposing party Anthony Marquez.

RULING:
DEFENDANT PAC OPERATING LIMITER PARTNERSHIP'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

Argument held. At the conclusion of argument, the Court stated that Defendant Pac Operating Limited Partnership's Motion to Strike Portions of Plaintiff's Complaint would be taken under submission on June 26, 2015. Each side was directed to submit a proposed order for the Court's consideration by June 26, 2015. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Court Reporter: Jaimie M. Hopp of BARKLEY COURT REPORTERS, CSR #13751 (Tel: 925-759-0770). (503/TLJ)

After the hearing had concluded, Ms. Blank noted that a single or "joint" proposed order for the motion to strike may be submitted by the parties in lieu of separate proposed orders.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Continued To Jun-24-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:

Jonathan A. Chen of WOOD SMITH HENNING & BERMAN LLP 949.757.4508, appearing for defendant/moving party PAC Operating Limited Partnership.

Mahzad K. Hite of LEVIN SIMES 415.426.3000, appearing for plaintiff/opposing party Anthony Marquez.

RULING:
Defendant PAC Operating Limited Partnership's demurrer to complaint.

Hearing held. The Court entered the following ruling: The Court sustained the Special Demurrer, plaintiff conceded that issue. The Court continued Defendant PAC Operating Limited Partnership's demurrer to complaint to June 24, 2015 at 9:30 am in Department 503 and set a briefing schedule. Plaintiff's supplemental opposition is due by 4:00 pm on June 16, 2015 and Defendant's supplemental reply is due by 4:00 pm on June 18, 2015, both filings are not to exceed 5 pages. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Court Reporter: Angela Pourtabib of Barkley Court Reporters, CSR #13714 (Tel. 415.433.5777) (503/TLJ)

Motion For Relief
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY MARQUEZ Motion For Relief

Appearances:

Mahzad K. Hite of LEVIN SIMES 415.426.3000, appearing for plaintiff/moving party Anthony Marquez.

Jonathan A. Chen of WOOD SMITH HENNING & BERMAN LLP 949.757.4508, appearing for defendant/opposing party PAC Operating Limited Partnership.

RULING:
PLAINTIFF ANTHONY MARQUEZ' MOTION FOR RELIEF.

Hearing held. The Court entered the following ruling: Plaintiff Anthony Marquez' Motion For Relief is denied. The Court noted that it still has the discretion to consider plaintiff's oppositions even though they were untimely filed. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Court Reporter: Angela Pourtabib of Barkley Court Reporters, CSR #13714 (Tel. 415.433.5777) (503/TLJ)

Pac Operating Limited Partnerships Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Continued To Jun-24-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:

Jonathan A. Chen of WOOD SMITH HENNING & BERMAN LLP 949.757.4508, appearing for defendant/moving party PAC Operating Limited Partnership.

Mahzad K. Hite of LEVIN SIMES 415.426.3000, appearing for plaintiff/opposing party Anthony Marquez.

RULING:
Defendant PAC Operating Limited Partnership's Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff's Complaint.

Hearing held. The Court entered the following ruling: The Court continued Defendant PAC Operating Limited Partnership's Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff's Complaint to June 24, 2015 at 9:30 am in Department 503 and set a briefing schedule. Plaintiff's supplemental opposition is due by 4:00 pm on June 16, 2015 and Defendant's supplemental reply is due by 4:00 pm on June 18, 2015 both filings are not to exceed 5 pages. The Court granted the motion to strike as to the strict liability. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Court Reporter: Angela Pourtabib of Barkley Court Reporters, CSR #13714 (Tel. 415.433.5777) (503/TLJ)
